description: Load the provided scenario or an empty scenario in the provided world.
examples:
<sqf>
//For a scenario located at ...\Arma 3 - Other Profiles\<PROFILENAME>\missions\subfolder\myMission.VR
//full path needs to be provided without leading \
load3DENScenario "missions\subfolder\myMission.VR";
</sqf>
name: load3DENScenario
